x_snc_airop_check_definition.ai_justification: Dynamic CI Groups define the scope boundaries for Now Assist AI agent targeting. Without them, Now Assist cannot scope event analysis or incident impact to specific business services.
x_snc_airop_check_definition.remediation_guidance: Create Dynamic CI Groups via cmdb_ci_query_based_service_list.do for key business services and infrastructure segments. Define groups by CI class, location, and business function. Dynamic CI Groups define scope boundaries for Now Assist ITOM AI Agent targeting.

sys_update_version.name: x_snc_airop_check_definition_4203a33acfd903108935fb251d851c4d
sys_update_version.payload:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update><x_snc_airop_check_definition action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE">
<ai_justification><![CDATA[Dynamic CI Groups define the scope boundaries for Now Assist AI agent targeting. Without them, Now Assist cannot scope event analysis or incident impact to specific business services.]]></ai_justification>
<check_name>Dynamic CI Groups Usage</check_name>
<check_script><![CDATA[(function(checkDef, dateFilter) {
    var ga = new GlideAggregate('cmdb_ci_query_based_service');
    ga.addAggregate('COUNT');
    ga.query();
    var count = ga.next() ? parseInt(ga.getAggregate('COUNT')) : 0;

    var actualValue = count + ' Dynamic CI Groups configured';

    if (count >= 5) {
        return {
            status: 'ready',
            actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: count + ' Dynamic CI Groups configured. Now Assist ITOM AI Agent targeting has well-defined scope boundaries for automated actions.'
        };
    } else if (count >= 1) {
        return {
            status: 'needs_attention',
            actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: 'Only ' + count + ' Dynamic CI Group(s) configured (target: 5+). Limited groups narrow the scope of Now Assist ITOM AI Agent targeting.'
        };
    } else {
        return {
            status: 'not_ready',
            actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: 'No Dynamic CI Groups configured. Now Assist ITOM AI Agents require Dynamic CI Groups to define scope boundaries for automated discovery probes and remediation actions.'
        };
    }
})]]></check_script>
<is_active>true</is_active>
<is_clone_sensitive>false</is_clone_sensitive>
<is_manual>false</is_manual>
<module>ITOM</module>
<number>CHK0005989</number>
<order>100</order>
<remediation_guidance>Create Dynamic CI Groups via cmdb_ci_query_based_service_list.do for key business services and infrastructure segments. Define groups by CI class, location, and business function. Dynamic CI Groups define scope boundaries for Now Assist ITOM AI Agent targeting.</remediation_guidance>
<sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by>
<sys_created_on>2026-06-09 22:05:59</sys_created_on>
<sys_id>4203a33acfd903108935fb251d851c4d</sys_id>
<sys_mod_count>0</sys_mod_count>
<sys_updated_by>admin</sys_updated_by>
<sys_updated_on>2026-06-09 22:05:59</sys_updated_on>
</x_snc_airop_check_definition></record_update>
